Metadata.title: Metrivyn — a smart layer over your health data
Metadata.description: Sleep, training and nutrition analysis with clear daily guidance.

Billing.title: Plan and billing
Billing.description: Review your plan, upgrade to Pro and manage your subscription in one place.
Billing.success: Payment received. Stripe is updating your subscription status; this may take a few seconds.
Billing.cancelNotice: Checkout was canceled. No payment was taken.
Billing.guestTitle: A permanent account is required for billing
Billing.guestDescription: Sign in with Google so your subscription stays linked to your profile and works across devices.
Billing.freeDescription: For exploring the app and tracking locally.
Billing.proDescription: Full data control, reports and synchronization.
Billing.freeFeature1: Guest mode without a bank card
Billing.freeFeature2: Quick entries and the basic dashboard
Billing.proFeature1: Google account and reliable data storage
Billing.proFeature2: Goals, habits, streaks and weekly reports
Billing.proFeature4: Import, history, profile and more precise goals
Billing.requestError: Could not open billing. Please try again.
Billing.stripe: Payments are securely processed by Stripe
Billing.cancelAnytime: Cancel your subscription at any time.

Landing.title: A personal health tracker that explains your data
Landing.subtitle: Metrivyn does not replace your sleep, training or nutrition tracker. It reads the data you already collect and turns it into one clear, personal action every day.

Dashboard.title: Health command center
Dashboard.subtitle: A calm summary of sleep, activity, nutrition, body and mood: what is done, what needs attention and what to do next.
